properties.displayName: JumpCloud - Software Change on Managed Device
properties.description: Alerts when software is added, removed, or changed on any managed device.
properties.query:
JumpCloud_Events_CL
| where log_type_s == 'directory_event'
| where di_service_s == 'software'
| where event_type_s in ('software_add', 'software_remove', 'software_change')
| summarize
    Changes = count(),
    Applications = make_set(application_name_s)
    by system_displayName_s, event_type_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Device = system_displayName_s,
    ChangeType = event_type_s,
    Changes,
    Applications
